mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.title, g.description, g.price, g.images, g.seller_id, g.status, g.create_time, g.update_time, u.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM t_goods g LEFT JOIN t_user u ON g.seller_id = u.id
AND g.status = 'ON_SALE'
AND (g.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY g.create_time DESC

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.description, g.price, g.images, g.seller_id, g.status, g.create_time, g.update_time, u.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM t_goods g LEFT JOIN t_user u ON g.seller_id = u.id WHERE g.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_goods (title, description, price, images, seller_id, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{images}, #{sellerId}, #{status})
